phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso dei giardini, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so day jee-AHR-dee-nee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua la strada principale, a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LAH STRAH-dah preen-chee-PAH-leh AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the main road, on the right.

responses.english: Follow the main road, on the right.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LAH STRAH-dah preen-chee-PAH-leh AH DEH-strah
responses.local: Segua la strada principale, a destra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah kyoo-DEH-teh OHD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il tour dei limoni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel TOUR day lee-MOH-nee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, serve la prenotazione per la degustazione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, SER-veh la preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh per la deh-goo-stah-TSYOH-neh, per fah-VOH-reh
